---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

> **Note:** If the bug is in the generated code itself (enums, DTOs, codecs, registrars), the fix likely belongs in [`php-opcua/opcua-cli`](https://github.com/php-opcua/opcua-cli/issues). If unsure, open it here and we'll triage it.

## Steps to Reproduce

```php
use PhpOpcua\Nodeset\Robotics\RoboticsRegistrar;
// Minimal code to reproduce the issue
```

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or exceptions if applicable.

## Environment

- PHP version:
- Library version:
- opcua-client version:
- OPC UA server: (e.g., open62541, Prosys, Unified Automation, etc.)
- OS:

## Additional Context

Any additional context, logs, or stack traces.
